articles.title: Suspended State Police sgt. pleads not guilty in deadly Woburn crash
articles.description:
Prosecutors say Sgt. Scott Quigley drunkenly crashed his cruiser into a van in 2023, mortally wounding a man who had developmental disabilities and used a wheelchair.
